# NIP-70 Reference Card

NIP-70 introduces protected events, which can only be published by their author. The "-" tag indicates a protected event. Relays must reject events with this tag unless the client is authenticated via NIP-42 and has the same pubkey as the event. Example: `["EVENT",{"id":"...","pubkey":"...","kind":1,"tags":[["-"]],"content":"..."}]`. Filter pattern: `["-", "pubkey"]`.
